key.name: allow-running-in-background
key.description: Whether the application should run in the background when the window is closed

key.name: default-page
key.description: The default page to open when the application starts

key.name: hide-secret-service-warning
key.description: Do not show any warning when the secret service health check fails on startup

key.name: window-height
key.description: Stores the last used window height to restore on next startup

key.name: window-width
key.description: Stores the last used window width to restore on next startup

key.name: allow-autoplay
key.description: Whether the application should keep feeding the user with mixes when reaching the end of a track list

key.name: normalize-volume
key.description: Set the same volume level for all tracks

key.name: replay-gain-mode
key.description: When to apply album or track replay gain

key.name: allow-mediacard-images
key.description: Whether the application will load the images for media cards

key.name: allow-shortcuts-images
key.description: Whether the application will load the images for shortcuts

key.name: allow-tracklist-images
key.description: Whether the application will load the cover for each track in a tracklist

key.name: cache-images
key.description: Whether the application will temporarily cache images on the filesystem

key.name: max-router-history-size
key.description: The maximum number of router history entries to keep

key.name: audio-quality
key.description: The highest accepted audio quality requested from TIDAL during playback

key.name: volume
key.description: The last configured volume level

key.name: enable-listenbrainz
key.description: Whether the application will attempt to scrobble tracks to ListenBrainz

key.name: listenbrainz-token
key.description: The token used to authenticate with ListenBrainz

key.name: listenbrainz-url
key.description: ListenBrainz-compatible instance API URL

key.name: enable-lastfm
key.description: Whether the application will attempt to scrobble tracks to Last.fm

key.name: lastfm-token
key.description: The token used to authenticate with Last.fm
